fields.name: interest-rate
fields.label: Interest Rate (%)
fields.description: Annual interest rate used for monthly payment calculation (e.g. 6.5)

fields.name: min-price
fields.label: Minimum Purchase Price
fields.description: Lowest purchase price value available in the calculator slider

fields.name: max-price
fields.label: Maximum Purchase Price
fields.description: Highest purchase price value available in the calculator slider

fields.name: min-term
fields.label: Minimum Term (years)
fields.description: Shortest loan term available in the calculator slider

fields.name: max-term
fields.label: Maximum Term (years)
fields.description: Longest loan term available in the calculator slider

fields.name: min-downpayment
fields.label: Minimum Down Payment
fields.description: Lowest down payment value available in the calculator slider

fields.name: max-downpayment
fields.label: Maximum Down Payment
fields.description: Highest down payment value available in the calculator slider

fields.name: apply-now-link
fields.label: Apply Now Link
fields.description: URL for the Apply now button

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.value: Estimate how much you could be paying monthly for your loan
